# kemp_replace_header_rule (Resource)

System-level rule that substitutes within a specific header value. Attach via `kemp_virtual_service_rule`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kemp_replace_header_rule" "rewrite_host" {
  name        = "rewrite-host-header"
  header      = "Host"
  pattern     = "^public\\.example\\.com$"
  replacement = "internal.example.local"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `header` (String) Header field to operate on.
- `name` (String)
- `pattern` (String) Pattern within the header value to match.
- `replacement` (String) Replacement string.

### Optional

- `only_on_flag` (Number)
- `only_on_no_flag` (Number)
